context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: (1) Block Assign/Unassign Colonies - Properties page has green 'Block Assign Colonies' and red 'Block Unassign Colonies' buttons that open dialogs with colony checkboxes and surveyor selection. (2) Old Photo Upload - Upload Data page has purple 'Upload Old Property Photos' section at bottom with file input for Excel files. (3) Show Full Town Map - Property Map page has green button that loads all 5315 properties on satellite map. (4) Survey.js has RELATION_OPTIONS with 'ग्राहक' (line 175) and photo_url display for property images (lines 686-696). (5) Duplicate prevention in copy-to-properties always checks property_id (server.py line 5637-5640).
